keyFindings.description: Tangential cleanup: two stale unsubscribeWorkerFromEnvoy references fixed to unsubscribeAllWorkerTopics. Harmless, just tangential to pipeline feature.
Linear backend limitation: backend defaults to 'github' for /state/fetch-and-collect, running with -b linear gives generic error instead of user-friendly message.
Done/skip issues render without bracketed status indicator. Reasonable design choice for settled issues, but an implicit 5th badge state not covered by AC.
